## What does this PR do?

Briefly describe the change and the issue it closes or relates to.

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## How was it implemented?

- High-level approach (no need to restate every file change).
- Any non-obvious decisions and why they were made.
- ADRs or prototypes referenced.

## How to test

- Commands to run (e.g., `pnpm test`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`).
- Manual verification steps if applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] The change matches the acceptance criteria of the linked issue.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or Recovery Codes are committed.
- [ ] Domain language from `CONTEXT.md` is used where appropriate.
- [ ] Code follows the [readable-code principles](../.agents/skills/readable-code/SKILL.md).

## Screenshots / recordings

If the change affects the UI, include before/after screenshots or a short recording.
